summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of the static HTML/CSS portfolio website. Tested desktop layout, mobile responsiveness, theme toggle animations, new cards, CSS optimizations, and all interactive elements. Most features working correctly with minor responsive design issues identified.

responsive_issues.issue: Cards don't stack to 1 column at 640px width as expected - shows single column layout but with different grid behavior

animation_issues.issue: Scroll hint opacity already at 0 initially, making hide-after-scroll behavior undetectable

passed_tests: Page loads correctly on desktop (1920x1080)
Hero section with split-text title displays correctly (7 word wrappers found)
Theme toggle switches between dark and light themes
Theme toggle uses clip-path circle() expanding animation
Bento grid displays with 4-column layout on desktop (448px each)
New Node.js & API card visible and correctly positioned
New Lighthouse Performance 98+ card visible with count-up animation
Stack marquee section visible with scrolling tech names animation
Process section displays correctly with 4 cards
CTA section with Telegram button displays and functions correctly
Footer with copyright and Telegram link visible
Mobile responsive: avail-badge correctly hidden at 390px width
Orange cursor dot (.cursor) correctly hidden (display:none)
CSS includes -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent
CSS includes touch-action: manipulation on body
CSS includes prefers-reduced-motion media query
CSS includes @media (pointer: coarse) for hiding cursor elements
btn-primary has gradient background with background-position transition
Cards hover shows transform and border color changes
Google Fonts URL includes font-display: swap
Count-up animation working correctly (98+ displayed)
Stack marquee animation running (transform matrix detected)
CTA Telegram button has pulseBtn animation
Cursor ring changes to rounded rectangle on button hover
All sections (hero, services, stack-marquee, process, cta, footer) present and visible
Theme flash clip-path circle animation implemented
All buttons are clickable and have correct href attributes
